device_name: LUMINOS Q.namix T; LUMINOS Q.namix R
intended_use: LUMINOS Q.namix T and LUMINOS Q.namix R are devices intended to visualize anatomical structures by converting an X-ray pattern into a visible image. It is a multifunctional, general R/F system, suitab
intended_use_full: LUMINOS Q.namix T and LUMINOS Q.namix R are devices intended to visualize anatomical structures by converting an X-ray pattern into a visible image. It is a multifunctional, general R/F system, suitable for routine radiography and fluoroscopy examinations, including gastrointestinal- and urogenital examinations and specialist areas like arthrography, angiography and pediatrics. LUMINOS Q.namix T and LUMINOS Q.namix R are not intended to be used for mammography examinations.
ground_truth: Expert radiologist evaluation of image quality and diagnostic acceptability
other_metrics: Images determined to be 'acceptable for diagnostic in radiography & fluoroscopy' and 'qualified for proper diagnosis' based on expert radiologist evaluation

recalls.reason: Ortho images acquired with preset automatic horizontal flip are not flipped and when acquiring single images, there is the possibility that an image of a previous patient may be processed.
